description: A large gull that was bigger than all others gulls near it (Herring, Ring-billed, Lesser Black-backed.)Using a scope and at the distance we were at, the bird's head appeared all white and the eyes pale. The bill was very large and long, all yellow with a red gonydeal spot.  The neck and underparts were white, the mantle and upper side of the wings were very dark and blackish. All white tail. Pink legs.  We only saw the bird standing but could see white tips to the primaries.Behaviors: Standing on ice.Call: not heardPlumage: adult
